title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #17, Sabo, Unknown person #14, Whitebeard, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #6 as the scene develops across pages 11–14.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #17, Sabo, Unknown person #14, Whitebeard, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: burn the trash heap to the ground?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Look!! Up in the northern sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Boss!! Boss, you have to see this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Is it coming from the city...?!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: No... that's closer than the city....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: That's the grey terminal...!! it's on fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Wake up, everyone!!! Run for your lives!!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #17, Sabo, Unknown person #14, Whitebeard, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.
